title: AN ACT RENAMING THE ENTIRE PORTION OF GEN. TRIAS ГўВЂВ” AMADEO ГўВЂВ” TAGAYTAY ROAD FROM GOVERNOR'S DRIVE TO TAGAYTAY CITY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO CRISANTO M. DE LOS REYES AVENUE

chunks.text:
H. No. 189 / 103 OG No. 40, 6252 (Oct. 1, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9476, May 22, 2007 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE ENTIRE PORTION OF GEN. TRIAS ГўВЂВ” AMADEO ГўВЂВ” TAGAYTAY ROAD FROM GOVERNOR'S DRIVE TO TAGAYTAY CITY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO CRISANTO M. DE LOS REYES AVENUE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In due recognition of the generous contributions and unending support of Crisanto M. De Los Reyes in the patriotic cause of out Filipino soldiers in Cavite during the Spanish occupation, the Gen. Trias ГўВЂВ” Amadeo ГўВЂВ” Tagaytay Road from Governor's Drive to Tagaytay City is hereby renamed as Crisanto M. De Los Reyes Avenue.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 6, 2005 and February 19, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 22 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
